items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of 'Seat-map geometry per venue/resource' as the linked use case explicitly states this need. Additionally, the prior steps indicate that resources representing hosts/assets/venues have been created, which implies that the necessary seat-map geometry is in place. The evidence from the linked use case and prior steps confirms that the requirement is covered without any gaps.
